tool_args.label: Eastern Parkway Transit Priority Proposal B14

payload.project_name: Eastern Parkway - Transit Priority Proposal B14 from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue
payload.description: Proposal to relocate B14 bus stops to southern pedestrian malls, install ADA-accessible bus stops with pavers, remove Rochester Avenue bus stop, and install ADA ramps connecting northern pedestrian malls along Eastern Parkway from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Eastern Parkway - Transit Priority Proposal B14 from Schenectady Avenue to Ralph Avenue
Draft Proposal – Brooklyn Community Board 9

Relocate B14 bus stops to the southern pedestrian malls. Replace current landscaping with hexagon pavers or smooth granite pavers, to make bus stops accessible. Retain existing eastbound right turn bays at Buffalo Avenue and Ralph Avenue. Proposed removal of the bus stop at Rochester Avenue. Install ADA ramps connecting northern pedestrian malls.

issues: evidence_refs[2].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: B14 eastbound bus operations on mainline

payload.claim_text: Eastbound B14 bus operators use the mainline to avoid traffic congestion and double parking along the service road, specifically at Utica Avenue.
payload.description: B14 buses use Eastern Parkway mainline instead of service road due to traffic conditions at Utica Avenue.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: B14 stop signage never moved to formalize operational change

payload.claim_text: B14 stop signage was never moved to formalize this operational change.
payload.description: Although B14 buses use the mainline, the stop signage was never updated to formalize the change.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Rochester Avenue bus stop removal rationale

payload.claim_text: Proposed to remove the B14 bus stops at Rochester Avenue for bus stop balancing, which would increase bus speeds and travel time.
payload.description: Removal of Rochester Avenue bus stop is expected to increase bus speeds and improve travel time.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed to remove the B14 bus stops at Rochester Avenue for bus stop balancing, which would increase bus speeds and travel time.
